channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Moonshot AI teases Kimi K3 conversational model in promotional video
item.description: Analysts expect an imminent launch to rival DeepSeek's R1.
item.content:encoded:
Analysts expect an imminent launch to rival DeepSeek's R1.

Original source: https://x.com/Kimi_Moonshot

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/85c3nzuo

  • Views: 172,707
  • Likes: 2,410
  • Bookmarks: 277
  • Quotes: 37
  • Replies: 133
  • Posts: 11

Top authors

  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Chubby♨️
  • Zephyr
  • Florian Brand

item.title: AI commentators debate branding of OpenAI and Anthropic marketing campaigns
item.description: Critics compared Anthropic's Claude advertisements to OpenAI's Super Bowl promotion.

item.title: Will Brown argues DeepSeek-V3 longevity counsels skepticism on recursive self-improvement
item.description: Skeptics warn that sigmoid flattening limits extreme AI research acceleration
item.content:encoded:
Skeptics warn that sigmoid flattening limits extreme AI research acceleration

item.title: Meta's Lucas Beyer compares data center water use to walnut crops
item.description: California walnuts consume 20 times more water than all US data centers.
item.content:encoded:
California walnuts consume 20 times more water than all US data centers.

item.title: Tanishq Mathew Abraham reports severe performance bugs on Twitter Android app
